title: 高难 clamshell 收纳盒
prompt_template: Create a {closure_style} clamshell enclosure with overall dimensions {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm. Use a {hinge_style}, keep wall thickness near {wall_thickness_mm}mm, include two-part lid/base separation, corner magnet slots, and a thumb notch. The outer form should remain smooth and printable.

title: 半壳定向开孔中难度案例
prompt_template: Create a two-part rounded enclosure sized {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm. The base should include side holes on the {hole_side} side and a cable relief on the front. Keep the lid and base mating faces aligned and printable, with wall thickness near {wall_thickness_mm}mm.

title: 中高难有机双壳收纳盒
prompt_template: Create a two-part rounded clamshell storage enclosure with overall dimensions {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm. Use a {hinge_style} at the back, keep wall thickness near {wall_thickness_mm}mm, add four corner magnet recesses on the mating faces, a front thumb notch about {thumb_notch_mm}mm wide, two shallow organic top cavities for small earphone shells, one bottom cable post, and one side plug pocket. Keep the shape smooth, printable, and clearly separated into lid and base.

title: 局部拓扑修饰练习
prompt_template: Create a rectangular electronics bracket sized {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm with a top pocket, two mounting holes, and a front thumb notch. Finish the model with local edge fillets around the top opening and a countersink on the mounting face so that a topology-aware local finishing pass is useful.

title: 前表面草图切除练习
prompt_template: Create a rectangular service bracket sized {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm with a shallow top pocket and two mounting holes on the bottom face. Add a centered rounded-rectangle recess on the front face sized about {recess_width_mm}mm x {recess_height_mm}mm and {recess_depth_mm}mm deep, plus small fillets around the top opening and countersinks on the mounting holes, so that a topology-aware local finishing pass on the front face is useful.

title: 中难度铰链磁吸小盒
prompt_template: Create a two-part rounded pillbox enclosure sized {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm with a {hinge_style} at the back. Keep wall thickness near {wall_thickness_mm}mm, separate the lid and base cleanly, add two magnet recesses on the mating faces near the front corners, add a front thumb notch about {thumb_notch_mm}mm wide, and add one shallow rounded recess on the front face for a label window. Keep the shell smooth, printable, and suitable for a follow-up topology-aware local finish if needed.

title: 双壳前后表面与铰链表达练习
prompt_template: Create a two-part rounded clamshell enclosure sized {width_mm}mm x {depth_mm}mm x {height_mm}mm with a {hinge_style} at the back. Keep wall thickness near {wall_thickness_mm}mm, keep the lid and base as clearly separated shells, add two shallow circular magnet recesses on the mating faces near the front corners, add one shallow rounded label recess and one thumb notch on the front face, and add one small cable exit on the {cable_side} side. Keep the front/back face semantics stable, place local shell cuts on the correct host faces, and represent the hinge as either a thin living hinge strip or detached hinge solids rather than a blocking merged bar.
